extName.message: BlazCaptcha: Free and Lightweight Image Captcha Solver

extDescription.message: Solve image CAPTCHAs with local OCR. Click the button, right-click an image, or paste in popup. No server, no API key — 100% free.

dropZoneHint.message: Drag & drop or paste an image

clickToFillHint.message: Copied! Click any input field to fill, or press Esc to cancel

welcomeSubtitle.message: Free and Lightweight Image CAPTCHA Solver — 3 Ways to Use

welcomeMethod1Desc.message: Auto-detected CAPTCHA gets a solve button. Click it to auto-fill the answer.

welcomeMethod2Desc.message: Right-click any CAPTCHA image and select "Recognize this CAPTCHA" from the menu.

welcomeMethod3Desc.message: Open the extension popup, paste or drop a CAPTCHA image to recognize it.

welcomeToastHint.message: Copied! Click any input to fill.

welcomeDropZone.message: 📎 Drag & drop or paste an image
